title: date
text: date Uniface data type that holds a sequence of numbers representing a date, in the format ccyymmdd . date ParameterName : Direction date VariableName Use Use in params and variables blocks to define the data type of a parameter or variable. The data type can be selected when defining fields, global variables, and component variables. Description The $date ProcScript function can be used to explicitly convert data to the date data type. Related Links $date Return the current date or convert the argument to the Date data type. Data Handling in ProcScript The ProcScript language enables you to convert data from one type to another, perform arithmetic operations, extract data values, and perform string substitution. Uniface carries out implicit type conversion whenever necessary, for example, when assignments are made between non-matching data types or when comparing non-matching data types. The ProcScript language also provides a number of functions that allow you to convert from one data type to another. Date and Time Data Uniface offers a wide variety of data types for date and time values. Packing Codes for Date and Time Data Uniface data types Date, Time, and Datetime (and linear variations of these) are associated with a variety of packing codes. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
